You are in the right place if

You are a Maine family
choosing differently.

You have made the decision. Homeschooling is the path for your family. What you need now is someone who can take the logistics, the planning, and the curriculum research off your plate — so you can show up as the calm, present parent you want to be.

You believe in medical freedom and parental rights in education
You want your child's education led by their values and interests

You want a real person in your corner — not a template or a course
You are done doing this alone

You've always been your child's best teacher. Let's keep it that way.

Ways to work together

There are three ways
I can support you.

Every family is different. Every offer is designed to meet you exactly where you are. Whether you need a plan, a portfolio, or a partner in your home — there is a right fit for you here.

4 Months · Remote · Done With You

Organize

Build a routine that actually works for your family.

I research, recommend, and organize curriculum into a custom daily rhythm for your homeschooler. Walk away with weekly agendas, monthly themes, and a full year mapped out so every day you know exactly what to do.

$3,500 Learn More
Most Popular 12 Months · Remote · Done For You

Confidence

Pull and go curriculum mailed to your door.

A fully custom homeschool portfolio delivered to your home — weekly lesson plans, a physical pull-and-go planner, assessments, and ongoing support through Telegram so you never feel stuck or overwhelmed again.

$12,000 Learn More
12 Months · In-Person · Southern Maine

Thrive

I come to your home. You are done doing this alone.

The most intimate offer I have. Quarterly home visits, 24/7 SOS support, curriculum rotation agendas, individual checklists for each child, and a physical portfolio we fill together. Two spots available.

From $18,000 Learn More
My story

I answered
the calling.

In 2019 I learned about vaccine mandates being forced on Maine students and I spent a lot of my energy advocating for medical freedoms and parental rights. I founded The Homeschool Admin in 2021 as infringements on family and student rights continued nationally.

My community called out to me. They knew I had the education, the experience as a nanny and early childhood educator, and the values to help them homeschool their children with confidence. So I answered.

My core values are faith, family, freedom, and child advocacy. I hold a Master's in Leadership from the University of Southern Maine and a Bachelor's in Child and Youth Development from Florida Gulf Coast University.

Master of Leadership Studies, University of Southern Maine
Bachelor's in Child and Youth Development, FGCU
55 families supported short-term, 30 families long-term
5 years of homeschool consulting in the state of Maine
